svg.title: UML Class Diagram — bomberman-core
svg.desc: Shared core entities: Bomberman, Player, Bomb, Explosion, Arena, Tile, Score, PowerUpItem, abstract Bonus + 7 subclasses, GameWorld, Snapshotter.
svg.text: Domain entities · simulation · DTOs (shared across server and client)
Entity colour: green = domain · cyan = sim/DTO · amber = bonus tree.
